messages.text: Build a premium, high-fidelity Real-time E-commerce page with glowing cinematic design, responsive grid, dynamic charts, and clean animations...

🧠 **AI Generation Plan & System Specification**

### 📋 Build Plan
- Setup core HTML structure, import Google Fonts, and establish global CSS variables for typography, color palette (deep blacks, stone/slate, one accent), and initial glassmorphism base styles.
- Implement a responsive CSS grid for product display, creating individual product cards with glassmorphism styling, 1px borders, hover transforms, and smooth transitions.
- Integrate a charting library (e.g., Chart.js via CDN) into `index.html`. Use `script.js` to initialize dynamic charts, simulate real-time e-commerce data (e.g., sales trends, stock levels), and update them dynamically.
- Develop interactive elements with clean animations, focus rings, and micro-interactions for buttons, navigation, and product cards, ensuring a glowing cinematic design aesthetic.

### 📁 Planned File Structure
- `index.html`
- `style.css`
- `script.js`
